programme.title: Classic Game Highlights
programme.desc: The 2012 AFC Divisional Round Game highlights between the Baltimore Ravens and Denver Broncos.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: DeSean Jackson scored on a 65-yard punt return on the final play of the game and the Philadelphia Eagles scored 28 points in the final 7:28 to stun the New York Giants 38-31 Sunday and take over first place in the NFC East.

programme.title: Classic Game Highlights
programme.desc: Watch the 1992 AFC Wild Card game highlights between the Houston Oilers and Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: Classic Game Highlights
programme.desc: Relive the Miracle in Motown where the Green Bay Packers take on the Detroit Lions during Week 13 of the 2015 NFL season.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the 1998 NFC Wild Card Game matchup between the Green Bay Packers and the San Francisco 49ers.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2010 NFC Wild Card: Saints vs. Seahawks
programme.desc: Matt Hasselbeck threw four touchdown passes and Marshawn Lynch scored on an electrifying 67-yard run with 3:22 left to clinch the first playoff victory by a losing team.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2003 NFC Divisional Round: Packers vs. Eagles
programme.desc: Donovan McNabb connected with Freddie Mitchell on a fourth-and-26 for a 28-yard gain as David Akers kicked the tying field goal to force overtime. Akers would kick the game-winner to win 20-17, advancing to the NFC Championship game.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: From the Immaculate Reception to the Minneapolis Miracle, take a look back at every play that's earned a nickname.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Dolphins demolish Broncos, 70-20, setting NFL record for most points in a game since 1966. De'Von Achane shines with 203 rushing yards.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2011: New England Patriots vs. Buffalo Bills
programme.desc: Buffalo Bills overcame a 21-0 second-quarter deficit and snapped a 15-game losing streak against New England Patriots where quarterback Fitzpatrick had a 21-point comeback. From Week 3, 2011.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Brian Hoyer and the Browns complete the largest comeback in league history by a road team in their 29-28 victory over the Titans.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Brian Hoyer and the Browns complete the largest comeback in league history by a road team in their 29-28 victory over the Titans.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Peyton Manning opens up the season with a seven touchdown performance against the reigning Super Bowl Champion Ravens in a 49-27 Broncos' statement victory.

programme.sub-title: Ireland and Northern Ireland - Atlantic Beginnings
programme.desc: Paul McGinley plays the stunning and legendary Hole 4 at The Old Head Golf Links, which perches on the edge of a cliff, overlooking the Atlantic Ocean.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: At Salgados in the Algarve, Chris plays the seventh hole, a par 4, and enjoys an afternoon in the sunshine as he takes on the palm-lined course.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan reveals her important pre-shot pointers; shares a drill for better balance and teaches how to build a repeatable swing like Scottie Scheffler.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: David Leadbetter demonstrates the drills and techniques he taught Nick Faldo before he won six major championships. Leadbetter also reveals how to perfectly grip the club and the technology he trusts when teaching his students.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como visits 20-year-old PGA Tour winner Matthew Wolff and long-time coach George Gankas in southern California. Gankas shares why Wolff's unorthodox backswing is effective and teaches how to create speed by focusing on rotation.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Instructor Chris Como is on a journey to explore golf's leading teachers and influencers who are shaping the game for future generations. Como travels the world in search of the culture, philosophy, and technology of successful players and coaches.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como travels to Texas and learns the course management strategies Scott Fawcett teaches through a combination of shot distribution patterns and PGA scoring stats. Learn where to aim off the tee and which type of shot to play out of trouble.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como travels to Scottsdale, AZ to learn how Tony Finau's swing change with his coach Boyd Summerhays propelled his career; how Finau's short backswing actually maximizes his driving distance.
